title: What is death bait Kaji
wikitext:
[]: What is death-bait Kaji?             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Sep 28, 2011 8:57 pm What is with the death-bait Kaji in the Q preview? I don't get it but I find it very funny. can you explain to me?

[]:             Quote Post by John » Wed Sep 28, 2011 9:08 pm Only a mistranslation from SSD in Eva 3.0 preview script. symbv wrote: [> Ready with a gun leveled, death-bait Kaji shouting.] Where did the "death-bait" come from? 必死? 必死 in this context (and its common usage) means "desperately" "frantically". Only in rare context would it mean "certain death". 銃を構えて必死に叫んでいる加持 would be translated as Ready with a gun, Kanji frantically shouting

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Thu Sep 29, 2011 2:29 pm Which hopefully means we'll actually get to see him...you know, do something other than garden in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Sep 29, 2011 2:41 pm Trajan wrote: Which hopefully means we'll actually get to see him...you know, do something other than garden in Rebuild.

[]: That head turn he gave in the series was good for it too. Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Sep 29, 2011 2:42 pm Darn, I thought this was going to be a Night at the Roxbury parody... Don't hurt me, don't hurt me, oh no! Trajan wrote: Which hopefully means we'll actually get to see him...you know, do something other than garden in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Thu Sep 29, 2011 3:16 pm riiightt.......... Mistranslation. It was funny

[]:             Quote Post by SaVaGe » Thu Sep 29, 2011 6:31 pm I hope that isn't the rebuild's take on his death scene. The whole casual invitation to death is so Kaji. But then again I kinda hope it is...it'd make him look a lot more badass. I'm torn

[]:             Quote Post by Relvetica » Fri Sep 30, 2011 9:04 am I hope he doesn't die at all! Mix it up, Q! Mercilessly cut down someone else this time!

[]:             Quote Post by Chroma » Sun Oct 02, 2011 4:25 pm Relvetica wrote: I hope he doesn't die at all! Mix it up, Q! Mercilessly cut down someone else this time!

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sun Oct 02, 2011 4:39 pm Chroma wrote: Like who? Most of the cast was dead by EOE anyway, besides the ones who were tanged.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Sun Oct 02, 2011 7:18 pm gatotsu911 wrote: ...a rollicking family tale about the globetrotting adventures of Gendo and Fuyutsuki and their donkey.
